economic_notes: 2311090 Ontario Inc. operates a general store (convenience goods and fuel). Long Lake FN Properties Limited Partnership conducts commercial rent. Casino Rama distributions included. Investments in Saturn Solar LP, Landmark Inn, Ga-Be-Shi-Win Limited Partnership, and Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP noted.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024 despite audit date of January 10, 2024). Consolidated entity includes 10 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 2 GBEs on modified equity basis (2311090 Ontario Inc. and Long Lake FN Properties Limited Partnership). Tangible capital asset net book value not directly stated on face of balance sheet in the extracted text (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $3,109,209 plus due to government $18,513. Total government transfers include ISC, CMHC, all Ontario ministries, Kinoomaadziwin Education Body, Union of Ontario Indians, Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership, Dilico Anishinabek Family Care, and Matawa First Nations Management. OSR includes administration fees, fundraising, interest, insurance proceeds, MTW, OPG, other revenue, rental income, and net deferred revenue adjustments. Prior year surplus recoveries of $96,079 recorded in accumulated surplus statement.
